title: UnSprited Armor
description: The pack for your keeping your armor a consistent 3D model!
body:
![spark_server](https://i.imgur.com/UV1gvFp.jpg)

![Behold](https://i.imgur.com/8FzB5ZN.png)
***
UnSprited Armor is the ultimate resource pack to keep all your wearable items consistent when not on the player. Items that are a 2D sprite or inconsistent with the model when worn have been turned 3D, this includes following:

- All Armor
- Elytra
- Heads and Skulls

![banner](https://i.imgur.com/wlGIFdT.png)

![Features](https://i.imgur.com/AfRhw7z.png93483284/1086427548889657395/Features.png)
***
This pack converts the armor item models into the wearable models you see on the Player! This includes every wearable item in the game!

This pack even works with other armor-changing packs, so use the armor pack of your choice with this one!

![UnSprited Thumbnail](https://i.imgur.com/HtBgN2v.png)

![socials](https://i.imgur.com/6mb4QDE.png)
***
